$curated: Per-state BODY node set for statistics (Template B — the 2 gen MxCard nodes streak-current/longest are NOT keyed in the FE, so there is no Template-A MxCard identity to gate; this asserts the keyed section-head SET per state). Chrome (screen / appbar) is excluded (matches dashboard.states.json). The 5 gated heads are the section cards. `accuracy-head` renders only when summary.hasReviews (review_outcome rows exist), so the `loaded` recipe seeds a review to include it. `scope-switch` is NOT a distinct node-set — it only flips the selected segment, so it renders the SAME set as `loaded` (listed for completeness, driven by the same recipe). `insufficient` (0 visible cards → _StatsInsufficient) and `loading` (_StatsSkeleton, pumped 1 frame without settle) render NO keyed head. Cross-checked by test/presentation/features/statistics/statistics_states_test.dart.
